# Show

A conditional rendering utility component that displays its children only when a condition is met, with an optional fallback.

## Import

```jsx
import { Show } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `when` | `boolean` | - | The condition that determines whether children are rendered. |
| `fallback` | `ReactNode` | - | Content to render when the condition is `false`. |

## Usage

### Basic Conditional Rendering

```jsx
<Show when={isLoggedIn}>
  <p>Welcome back!</p>
</Show>
```

### With Fallback

```jsx
<Show when={isLoggedIn} fallback={<p>Please log in to continue.</p>}>
  <p>Welcome back, {user.name}!</p>
</Show>
```

### With Loading State

```jsx
<Show when={!isLoading} fallback={<Spinner />}>
  <DataTable data={data} />
</Show>
```
